channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: i Politics: Andy Burnham's fight for No 10 could be in jeopardy - and it's down to one issue
item.description: Andy Burnham's fight for No 10 could be in jeopardy - and it's down to one issue

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Burnham says politics ‘needs new script’ and vows to change Labour if elected as Makerfield MP – UK politics live
item.description: Burnham says politics ‘needs new script’ and vows to change Labour if elected as Makerfield MP – UK politics live

item.title: BBC Politics: Ministers want new voting system in place for possible Manchester mayor race
item.description: Ministers want new voting system in place for possible Manchester mayor race

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham does little to hide his true ambitions with a by-election launch promising ‘change’
item.description: Andy Burnham does little to hide his true ambitions with a by-election launch promising ‘change’

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting - The Guardian
Guardian (Open Platform): ‘He’s a natural’: Andy Burnham’s allies give his social media style a thumbs up

item.title: FT UK Politics: Game on: All eyes on Makerfield by-election
item.description: Game on: All eyes on Makerfield by-election

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham latest: Vote for me is a vote to change Labour, Manchester mayor tells Makerfield as he unveils slogan
item.description: Andy Burnham latest: Vote for me is a vote to change Labour, Manchester mayor tells Makerfield as he unveils slogan

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: How to build a good prime minister: We've fucked it up not once, not twice, but at least seven times in succession. Maybe let's do it differently this time iandunt.substack.com/p/how-to-bui...
item.description: How to build a good prime minister: We've fucked it up not once, not twice, but at least seven times in succession. Maybe let's do it differently this time iandunt.substack.com/p/how-to-bui...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Healey asks Farage if any of £5m gift may have come from Russia-linked profits
item.description: Healey asks Farage if any of £5m gift may have come from Russia-linked profits
